Package project2_root.controllers

Interface Controller

All Known Implementing Classes:
CreateOrderController, EmployeeEditController, LoginPageController, ManagerActionsController, ManagerController, MenuItemEditController, OrderDetailController, OrderInventoryController, OrderPageController, ProductUsageController, XReportController, ZReportController
public interface Controller
Common interface for FXML controllers that receive an injected screen model.

    void
    setModel(Model m)
    Binds the model used by this controller.
